rounds.rationale: Initial judgment prefers the EC2 UltraServer role because it shares the generic SDE must-have backbone and cross-functional workflow language.
Requirement-unit review shows the query lacks a stable domain anchor, so another internal product SDE candidate remains equally plausible.
Consistency review still cannot separate candidates using requirement units alone; the query is dominated by generic SDE must-haves and weak background text.

label_pool.disagreement_reason: Generic-title Amazon SDE query lacks a decisive domain or tech anchor after three self-reviews.

taxonomy: Consider adding DOMAIN_HR_SYSTEMS aliases such as workforce solutions and employee onboarding if more evidence appears.
rules: Do not force a semantic positive when requirement units are mostly generic must-have software engineering clauses.

rounds.rationale: The robotics ML systems role matches the query's ML infrastructure and LLM-oriented software engineering shape better than recommendation-oriented SDEs.
Requirement-unit review confirms the candidate has AND-style infrastructure plus PyTorch/LLM units, while the current gold lacks those parent-child ML-system signals.
Final consistency check keeps the robotics ML systems role as the strongest semantic anchor.

taxonomy: Add DOMAIN_AGENT_SYSTEMS aliases such as agentcore and multi-agent workflows to better separate ML-agent infrastructure from generic ML SDE roles.
rules: Parent-child matching should reward ML infrastructure plus LLM bundles above generic AI software development overlap.

rounds.rationale: Same-title networking role is the clearest semantic twin.
Requirement-unit review confirms shared networking and control-plane background units on top of identical SDE must-haves.
Final check preserves the networking SIDR duplicate as the correct positive.

rules: Must/preferred confusion should not demote exact semantic twins when networking and control-plane units align.

rounds.rationale: The paired SIDR role shares networking/control-plane background instead of only generic platform infrastructure.
Hierarchy review confirms DOMAIN_NETWORKING and TECH_CONTROL_PLANE are better than sibling infrastructure-only roles.
Consistency review keeps the same networking positive.

rules: Parent-child logic should prefer networking child units over generic infrastructure siblings.

rounds.rationale: Exact Drupal developer peer is the clearest positive.
Requirement-unit review confirms the PHP/HTML/CSS/JavaScript/MySQL AND bundle.
Final check remains unchanged.

rules: Keep mixed OR/AND bundle handling for web-stack requirement units.

rounds.rationale: The NTT DATA North America Data Engineer role shares the same SQL/Python-or-Java/Spark pipeline shape.
Requirement-unit review confirms the OR unit over Python/Java and the AND bundle with Spark and Kubernetes.
Consistency review keeps the same data-engineering positive.

rules: Mixed OR/AND logic should continue to reward data-engineering bundles above generic cloud-data roles.

rounds.rationale: Buyer Abuse Prevention ML shares the same applied-scientist model-building and Java/C++/Python must-haves.
Requirement-unit review shows the current gold over-indexes on GenAI preference while the buyer-risk role matches the actual must-have bundle.
Final consistency check keeps the buyer-risk applied scientist role.

taxonomy: Add DOMAIN_AD_MEASUREMENT aliases such as measurement science if repeated evidence appears.
rules: Must-have model-building plus programming-language overlap should outrank unrelated GenAI preference-only positives.

rounds.rationale: The buyer-risk applied scientist role matches ML/model-building child units better than broader AI/compiler roles.
Hierarchy review confirms the current top generic software engineering candidates are sibling roles, not true applied-science ML children.
Consistency review remains unchanged.

rules: Parent-child matching must separate applied-science ML roles from generic SWE siblings.

rounds.rationale: Aurora DSQL query processing is the clearest database-engineering semantic match.
Requirement-unit review shows the current gold lacks SQL/database-specific strong-preference units, while Aurora DSQL has them.
Final consistency check keeps Aurora DSQL.

taxonomy: Add DOMAIN_DATABASE_ENGINES aliases such as distributed SQL, DSQL, Aurora DSQL, and query processing.
rules: Discriminative SQL/database-engine strong-preference units should outrank generic SDE must-have parity.

rounds.rationale: Senior Space Infrastructure is the obvious semantic parent/near-duplicate.
Requirement-unit review confirms shared infrastructure, Python, Docker, Linux and CI/CD stack; the previous gold is a stale false positive.
Final consistency check keeps the Loft Orbital infrastructure role.

taxonomy: Add DOMAIN_SPACE_SYSTEMS aliases such as space infrastructure and satellite operations.
rules: Remove stale false positives from curated hard pools when they are contradicted by current requirement units.

rounds.rationale: IAM Integration Engineer is a better customer/security/support anchor than a generic senior software engineer.
Requirement-unit review confirms customer-facing problem solving, security and integration semantics.
Final consistency check remains unchanged.

rules: Title overlap must not override customer/security integration semantics.

rounds.rationale: Electric Utility Grid Hadron peer is the clear cross-company structural twin.
Requirement-unit review confirms nearly identical language, OO language OR-unit, and software engineering lifecycle clauses.
Final consistency check remains unchanged.

taxonomy: Add DOMAIN_ENERGY_SYSTEMS aliases such as electric utility grid if this cluster continues to grow.

rounds.rationale: The paired Hadron role remains the clearest structural twin.
Requirement-unit review confirms the same language and lifecycle clauses.
Final consistency check remains unchanged.
The AWS-named twin is still the correct semantic positive while same-company distractors remain generic SDE roles.
Requirement-unit review confirms that same-company alternatives are structurally weaker than the paired Hadron role.
Final consistency check remains unchanged.

rules: Same-company distractors should stay below the matched structural twin in semantic-only evaluation.

rounds.rationale: The Amazon-named twin remains the clearest semantic positive.
Requirement-unit review confirms same-company distractors are structurally weaker.
Final consistency check remains unchanged.

boundary_pool.rationale: Generic-title Amazon SDE query is dominated by generic software-engineering must-haves and lacks a decisive domain anchor. Pure semantic retrieval should allow multiple acceptable positives instead of forcing a single gold answer.

selection_basis: OR/AND or must/preferred or parent-child category

pending_manual_pool.disagreement_reason: Generic-title Amazon SDE query lacks a decisive domain or tech anchor after three self-reviews.

Generic-title Amazon SDE query is dominated by generic software-engineering must-haves and lacks a decisive domain anchor. Pure semantic retrieval should allow multiple acceptable positives instead of forcing a single gold answer.

feedback_loops.gold_set_and_hard_pool: Accepted codex-curated cases flow into semantic_gold and rebuilt_hard tracking.
feedback_loops.taxonomy_alias_updates: Pending alias candidates are stored by incremental ingest for later absorption or rejection.
feedback_loops.requirement_unit_rules: Error decomposition priority feeds parser and scorer rule updates.
feedback_loops.future_student_distillation: Only frozen semantic teacher traces should be used for the next student distillation pass.

dual_channel_architecture.semantic_channel: Requirement-unit / taxonomy / logic / hierarchy only. No same_company or duplicate shortcut.
dual_channel_architecture.company_channel: Same-company continuity channel using title continuity plus semantic support, separate from the semantic teacher.

output_protocol.semantic_best_anchor: Global best reusable anchor for Writer skeleton.
output_protocol.semantic_explanation: Requirement-unit hit summary and hard-gap explanation.
output_protocol.delta_summary: Why semantic-best and company-best differ and how downstream should combine them.

downstream_writer_interface.same_anchor_case: Use a single anchor as both semantic and continuity template.
downstream_writer_interface.semantic_better_company_exists: Use semantic_best as the main skeleton and company_best as continuity reference.
downstream_writer_interface.company_anchor_too_old_or_gap_heavy: Downgrade continuity anchor and keep semantic_best only.

training_phase: teacher freeze and future student distillation
runtime_phase: incremental ingest and alias queue append

ingest_rules.index_new_job: Add any non-duplicate, non-quarantined structured job to the live semantic engine immediately.
ingest_rules.dedupe: Fingerprint on company/title/pattern/canonical set merges exact near-duplicates.
ingest_rules.quarantine: Low-semantic-signal jobs are isolated instead of polluting the main pool.
ingest_rules.pattern_merge: Pattern index grows by signature and combo keys on ingest.
ingest_rules.new_alias_state_flow: Pending surface tokens become alias candidates with pending status until absorbed or rejected offline.

offline_rebuild_indexes: canonical taxonomy alias compilation after accepted alias updates
incremental_strategy.fast_next_round_retrieval: New jobs are retrievable immediately after ingest via MatchEngine.add_structured_job.

boundary_policy.generic_title_policy: Queries dominated by generic must-have software-engineering clauses may have multiple acceptable positives or abstain from forced single-positive adjudication.

next_student_plan: Do not redistill student until teacher_b_freeze_decision.passed is true.
When frozen, distill only the semantic channel into the new student.
Keep company continuity as a separate lightweight reranker, not part of the student core.
